runs.notes: Fill with real physical-device evidence. Do not paste raw video paths, faces, account ids, or secrets.
Fill with real physical-device evidence. Do not paste raw video paths, faces, account ids, or secrets.

instructions: Copy evidenceDraft into docs/sdlc/native-qa-evidence.json after replacing every pending/null value with real device results.
Run npm run native:qa:validate and keep the generated evidence local until it contains no raw video identifiers or secrets.
Store submission remains blocked until both android and ios runs pass the validator.

runbooks.label: Android physical device

performance.label: Repeated-analysis performance budget
performance.sampleSize: Run at least one camera clip and one imported clip; repeat five analyses when preparing store evidence.

setup: Install a custom native build, not Expo Go.
Use a real climbing clip with consent and no visible bystanders.
Enable airplane mode before the offline-analysis workflow.
Record only pass/fail evidence and aggregate timing; do not store raw video paths in committed docs.

workflows.expectedEvidence: Tester marks pass only after the workflow succeeds on the physical device.
workflows.label: Camera permission flow

workflows.expectedEvidence: Tester marks pass only after the workflow succeeds on the physical device.
workflows.label: Record video

workflows.expectedEvidence: Recording completes without microphone permission and without audio capture.
workflows.label: Muted recording profile

workflows.expectedEvidence: Report or QA notes include native duration and dimensions for camera and import clips.
workflows.label: Native video metadata read

workflows.expectedEvidence: Tester marks pass only after the workflow succeeds on the physical device.
workflows.label: Video import

workflows.expectedEvidence: A local camera/import clip produces a report while airplane mode is enabled.
workflows.label: Airplane-mode local analysis

workflows.expectedEvidence: Tester marks pass only after the workflow succeeds on the physical device.
workflows.label: Report deletion
